name: web-frontend-report-viewer
description: MCP App that renders an interactive triage viewer for web-frontend-testing executive reports.

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "tsx --watch main.ts"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
